ddls:
CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation entry */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* Province or state where the observation was made */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country or region of the observation */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to this observation */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases reported */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths reported */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases reported */,
  "case_severity" TEXT /* Severity of cases (e.g., mild, severe, critical) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_province_state FOREIGN KEY ("province_state") REFERENCES provinces ("province_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_country_region FOREIGN KEY ("country_region") REFERENCES countries ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country/region */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country/region */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province/state */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province/state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country it belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for correspondence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* The field in the observation being validated */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* The rule or check to be applied to the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to access the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_types" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms of the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "administration_date" TEXT /* Date of vaccine administration */,
  "vaccination_center" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report (could be a summary or detailed data) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, JSON) */,
  "report_category" TEXT /* Category of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "article_content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the setting belongs */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the system update */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of release */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the system update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)
